content.content: British actor and recording artist known for his voice acting work in a number of feature films, includingMissing LinkandAlice Through the Looking Glass. He has also released a number of popular singles and received the Rising Star Award at the 2021 Hollywood Music in Media Awards. He shares his current projects on his iamajrodriguez Instagram account, where he has accumulated 550,000 followers. He landed his first voice acting role in 2013 as Cardamom in the popular animated series Bee and PuppyCat. He posts behind the scene clips from set, promotes his music, and shares challenge videos on his iamajrodriguez TikTok account, where he has over 70,000 likes. His behind the scenes video about this music video for his hit single "Mesmerized" received over 14,000 views. In October of 2022, he posted a series of videos featuring a large real-life snake. He was born in Marbella, Spain. He has a chocolate Labrador named Bosley and a horse named Rosie. In 2014, he joinedFred Willard,Angela Kinsey, andMike Hagertyin the cast of All-Stars.
